tables.reasoning: The emp_master table contains employee information that closely matches the structure and fields of the employees collection in the MongoDB schema.

field_mappings.reasoning: emp_id is the primary key in the source table and maps to the _id field in the destination collection.
field_mappings.notes: Use emp_id to generate a new ObjectId.

field_mappings.reasoning: emp_cd is a unique human-readable employee code that matches the employeeCode field in the destination collection.
f_name is the first name of the employee and maps to the firstName field within the fullName object in the destination collection.
l_name is the last name of the employee and maps to the lastName field within the fullName object in the destination collection.
hire_dt is the hire date of the employee and maps to the startDate field within the employment object in the destination collection.
term_dt is the termination date of the employee and maps to the endDate field within the employment object in the destination collection.
dept_id is the department ID and maps to the departmentId field within the department object in the destination collection.
field_mappings.notes: Use dept_id to generate a new ObjectId.

field_mappings.reasoning: mgr_emp_id is the manager's employee ID and maps to the managerId field within the employment object in the destination collection.
field_mappings.notes: Use mgr_emp_id to generate a new ObjectId.

field_mappings.reasoning: job_lvl_cd is the job level code and maps to the jobLevel field within the employment object in the destination collection.
base_sal is the base salary and maps to the baseSalary field within the compensation object in the destination collection.
sal_currency is the salary currency and maps to the currency field within the compensation object in the destination collection.
work_email is the work email and maps to the email field within the contact object in the destination collection.
work_phone is the work phone number and maps to the phone field within the contact object in the destination collection.
office_loc_id is the office location ID and maps to the locationId field within the location object in the destination collection.
field_mappings.notes: Use office_loc_id to generate a new ObjectId.

field_mappings.reasoning: is_remote indicates if the employee is remote and maps to the isRemote field within the employment object in the destination collection.
field_mappings.notes: Convert 0 to false and 1 to true.

field_mappings.reasoning: rec_stat is the record status and maps to the status field within the employment object in the destination collection.
field_mappings.notes: Convert A to 'active', I to 'inactive', T to 'terminated'.

field_mappings.reasoning: created_ts is the record creation timestamp and maps to the createdAt field within the meta object in the destination collection.
updated_ts is the last update timestamp and maps to the updatedAt field within the meta object in the destination collection.
